---
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .Rmd
      format_name: rmarkdown
      format_version: '1.2'
      jupytext_version: 1.19.1
  kernelspec:
    display_name: R
    language: R
    name: ir
---

```{r}
install.packages(
    c("caret", "kernlab", "nnet", "factoextra", "ggplot2", "dbscan", "umap", "arules")
)
```

```{r}
!pip install pandas scikit-learn matplotlib statsmodels umap-learn mlxtend
```

## Data used for the tasks

We use [FDS3077](https://services.fsd.tuni.fi/catalogue/FSD3077?study_language=en) Cross-national Survey on the Future of the Welfare State 2015 as our dataset.
